ddls:
CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "player_name" TEXT /* Full name of the player */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the team the player belongs to */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the player */,
  "matches_played" INTEGER /* Total matches played by the player */,
  "runs" INTEGER /* Total runs scored by the player */,
  "average" REAL /* Batting average of the player */,
  "strike_rate" REAL /* Strike rate of the player */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the player */,
  "batting_style" TEXT /* Batting style of the player */,
  "bowling_style" TEXT /* Bowling style of the player */,
  "player_type" TEXT /* Type of player */,
  "career_best_batting" INTEGER /* Career-best batting score of the player */,
  "career_best_bowling" TEXT /* Career-best bowling figures of the player */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Whether the player is currently active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_players_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the team's home ground */,
  "established_year" INTEGER /* Year the team was established */,
  "league_id" INTEGER /* ID of the league the team belongs to */,
  "coach_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team's coach */,
  "captain_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team's captain */,
  "home_stadium" TEXT /* Name of the team's home stadium */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "bowling_statistics" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the player */,
  "wickets" INTEGER /* Total wickets taken by the player */,
  "bowling_average" REAL /* Bowling average of the player */,
  "economy" REAL /* Economy rate of the player */,
  "bowling_strike_rate" REAL /* Bowling strike rate of the player */,
  "best_bowling_figures" TEXT /* Best bowling figures of the player */,
  "most_wickets_in_a_match" INTEGER /* Most wickets taken by the player in a match */,
  "most_runs_conceded" INTEGER /* Most runs conceded by the player in a match */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "matches" (
  "match_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each match */,
  "team1_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the first team in the match */,
  "team2_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the second team in the match */,
  "match_date" TEXT /* Date when the match was played */,
  "venue" TEXT /* Venue where the match took place */,
  "result" TEXT /* Result of the match (e.g., Team1 wins, Team2 wins) */,
  "match_type" TEXT /* Type of match */,
  "match_format" TEXT /* Format of the match */,
  "winning_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the winning team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("match_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_team2_id FOREIGN KEY ("team2_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_team1_id FOREIGN KEY ("team1_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., Coach, Analyst, Admin) */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role */,
  "role_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the role assigned to the user */,
  "full_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_performance" (
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance record */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the player */,
  "match_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the match */,
  "runs_scored" INTEGER /* Runs scored by the player in the match */,
  "wickets_taken" INTEGER /* Wickets taken by the player in the match */,
  "fifties" INTEGER /* Fifties scored by the player in the match */,
  "hundreds" INTEGER /* Hundreds scored by the player in the match */,
  "maiden_overs" INTEGER /* Maiden overs bowled by the player in the match */,
  "dot_balls" INTEGER /* Dot balls bowled by the player in the match */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_performance_match_id FOREIGN KEY ("match_id") REFERENCES matches ("match_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_performance_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "team_standings" (
  "standing_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each standing record */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the team */,
  "matches_played" INTEGER /* Total matches played by the team */,
  "points" INTEGER /* Points accumulated by the team */,
  "net_run_rate" REAL /* Net run rate of the team */,
  "games_won" INTEGER /* Games won by the team */,
  "games_lost" INTEGER /* Games lost by the team */,
  "no_results" INTEGER /* No-results for the team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("standing_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_standings_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)
